creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
rafan       2006-11-21 07:24:32 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/lcdproc     Makefile 
    sysutils/lcdproc/files lcdproc.in 
  Log:
  - Changed lcdproc client startup script to require config file, because
    command line switch to daemonize is not supported as of version 0.5.1.
  
  PR:             ports/105681
  Submitted by:   Markus Dolze <bsdfan at nurfuerspam.de> (maintainer)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.10      +1 -0      ports/sysutils/lcdproc/Makefile
  1.2       +4 -2      ports/sysutils/lcdproc/files/lcdproc.in
